About

About
Me.

2nd-year CSE (AI-ML) student at JSSATE Bengaluru. I build production-grade applications — from AI dental diagnostic systems that fuse YOLOv8 with Llama-3, to fintech dashboards handling 100+ concurrent positions in real time.

3× National and Inter-Collegiate Hackathon Winner . I have competed against 170+ teams across national and inter-collegiate competitions and secured first place every single time.

I don't just study technology — I ship it.

Things I've
Built.

01

DENTRA

DentalVision AI🏆 1st Place · National · 70+ teams

End-to-end AI diagnostic pipeline. Upload a dental X-ray — get cavity detection, LLM treatment reasoning, and a patient-ready PDF report in seconds. Built in 24 hours.

2026↗
02

SigmaGPT

AI Image Generation SaaS

Production AI image-generation SaaS with credit-based billing. Stripe payment processing, JWT auth, CDN-optimised delivery. 100+ transactions/month, 50+ concurrent users.

Gemini 2.5StripeReact 19JWTImageKit CDN
2025↗

NEXUS AUTH

Multimodal Biometric Security🏆 1st Place · National · 70+ teams

Multimodal biometric authentication — gesture recognition, voice-liveness detection, spoof prevention, and emergency SOS. Production-grade system built in 24 hours.

Computer VisionVoice AIReactNode.jsML
